notes: single-channel brushless ESC for one drive motor — a 2WD build needs two instances, one per wheel, the same way two single-channel weapon ESCs would be used rather than a dual-channel one. No BEC of its own, same as the weapon ESC.
description: A single-channel brushless drive ESC — the brushless counterpart to the brushed dual-ESC, one per motor rather than one for both.
